About This Property

Space, Fun & Total Privacy

Welcome to The Team Stay House — a beautifully designed, brand-new Brampton home that earns a perfect 5.0 rating across every category. Built for groups who need space to spread out, this property offers three separate lounges across three levels, ensuring everyone has their own place to relax, work, or unwind.

The main floor sets the tone with a bright open-concept living area, a modern white kitchen with black granite island, a separate dining room with globe pendant lighting, and a stylish family room centred around a fireplace and Smart TV. Walk out to the private upper deck for fresh air and neighbourhood views.

The upper level features five bedrooms — two kings and three queens — plus a dedicated laundry room and a charming resting lounge. The basement is the entertainment centrepiece: a full-size pool table, carrom board, home theatre projector, and a dedicated king bedroom suite with private ensuite bathroom.

With three distinct living spaces across three floors, this home is uniquely suited for project teams, corporate groups, and extended stays where privacy and personal space matter as much as shared amenities.
